mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_base (title, file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, content_summary, status, category, visit_count) VALUES (#{title}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{contentSummary}, #{status}, #{category}, #{visitCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_base SET title = #{title}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, content_summary = #{contentSummary}, status = #{status}, category = #{category} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_base SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_base SET visit_count = visit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
